hero.title: Ingniqutiliqinikkut Auladjutit tapkua aktilaangit
hero.subtitle: Enterprise Software · AI unalu Machine Learning · Cloud Infrastructure · IoT unalu Edge
hero.description: Ayuitpiaqtumik aatumatikkuurutinit cloud-native tunngaviit, hanayaghaliuqpaktugut tunihiplutalu qaritauyakkuurutinik hakugikhiyuumiqtitait nanminiriyauyunut — tuuliiqhimaittumik, maningnik atuqhutik, aktilanganiklu.

services.subtitle: Kivgaqtuutivut
services.title: Tamatkiumayumik Spectrum Engineering
services.description: Siksiuyut ayuiqhavikhat. Attauhiq iligiit. Tamaat qaliriiktut qaritauyakkuurutingnut — edge devices talvunga havagviuyunut dashboards.

customSoftware.title: Ihuaqhaqhimayut Qaritauyaliqutit Pivalianigit
customSoftware.description: Nutaat atuqtakhangit piliurhimayut microservices-nik, APIs-nik, unalu cloud-native architecture.

aiMl.title: AI, ML unalu Business Intelligence
aiMl.description: AI/ML pipelines, Power BI dashboards, unalu hivutunirmik analytique tapkua pidjutauyut naunaiyautit ihumaliurutinun.

cloud.title: Cloud Architecture & Infrastructure
cloud.description: Multi-cloud aulapkaitjutikhanik containers-nik, serverless-mik, nunaryuamilu scalability iliuraqhimayuq.

iot.title: IoT unalu Edge Computing
iot.description: Atadjutiqaqtut hanaqidjutit, digital twins, uvalu edge computing haffumunga Industry 4.0.

devops.title: DevOps unalu Platform Engineering
devops.description: CI/CD turhuat, aulapkaitjutikhanik naunaitkutamik, qun'ngiaqtaarniqlu angirutimit piliurninnganut.

digital.title: Nampanik Aadlangurninnga unalu Uqaqatigiikniq
digital.description: Qaritauyaliqinikkut hanaqidjutit, nutaanguqtirnikkut apqutighat, uvalu havakhutik uqaudjiniq.

cta.title: Piliuqta Hunamiklikaak Akhuurnaqtumik
cta.description: Ihuaqhaqhimajunit qaritaujaliqutikhanut pivalliadjutikhat imaalu AI-powered solutions talvunga cloud nappaqtirutikhanut imaalu aatumatitut — tunihivaktugut nunguanit nunguanut qaritaujaliqutikhanut ikajuutikhanik ihuaqhaqhimajut pijumajarnut.

credibility.subtitle: Atuqpakhimayaptingnik
credibility.title: Qanurilinigit, <gradient>Uqariiyaqhimagitut</gradient>
credibility.description: Sarajevo-mit Oslo-mut, Amsterdam-mut, Berlin-mullu. Timiqutigiyauyut timiqutigiyangit tuniyauyuq tuuliiqhimaittumik, tamaat.

atlascopco.label: Cloud IAM for Atlas Copco
atlascopco.outcome: Piliuqtuq hivulliqpaaqpiaq cloud-tunnganiqaqtuq One Identity aulapkaitjutikhanik Atlas Copco uumani Azure Kubernetes, mikhilaaqtirnikkut akiinnik huli aulapkaihimmaaqtilluni havakviup maliktakhainnik.

orange.label: Aupayaangayuq Cyberdefense Platform
orange.outcome: Piliuqtut Azure Kubernetes aulapkaidjutikhanik, CI/CD pipelines, imaalu ihuaqhaqhimajunik ServiceNow ilaliutidjutikhanik Europe-mi hivulliqtiujut qaritaujaliqidjutikkut havagviit.

telecom.label: Telecom GIS unalu AR Tunngavinga
telecom.outcome: Hanahimayut GIS-nik tungavikhanik nunauyaliuqhutik nunap ataagut alruyaqtuutinik humiliqaa Germany-mi tuluqtautinik naunaipkutimik ahiruqtiqtailivlutik amihunik miliatalanik Euro-nik hanahimayunik ahiruqtiqniginik.

iot.label: Cloud IoT unalu Edge Platform
iot.outcome: Azure IoT Hub munariyait tausinik qaritauyakkuurutinik, Synapse havakpagait billion-nik alruyaqtuqtunik naunaiyautinik, edge aggregation mikhiyuumiqhugit tuhaqtidjutit akiit imaa ~90 pusat.

drone.label: Inmikkut Drone Tungavia
drone.outcome: Ihuaqhaqhimayut tingmitit munaqhiyut 4G-to-Azure IoT Hub ikaarutikhamik pipkaiyut inmikkut BVLOS tingmitit nautiinikkut munaridjutit uvalu uhidjutait.

payment.label: Akiliktuihimaaqtunik Hanaqidjutikharnik Ikayuktiuyut
payment.outcome: Annaktaujuq ihuittumik akiliqhitikhanik Norwegian mobile app himmauhiqhimajumik titiraqhimaittut uttuqqait naunaitkutait. Akiliqhilimaittut nutannguqtiqtaulraaqtitlugu.

game.label: AAA Game Dev Tooling
game.outcome: Piliuqtuq Maya plugin mikhilaaqtitaa 3D modeling and animation time imaatun 50%mik angijumi AAA studio-mi, atuqtauliqtuq atuqtauraanginnaqtumik hanalrutimik piliurnikkut pipeline-mi.

social.label: Nayugaani-Pihimayut Inungnun Tungaviit
social.outcome: Piliuqhimajuq piqatigiigutikkut qaritaujakkuuruti ukununga Spain-mi unnuktumi inuuhiinni piqarhuni humiittaakhaanik aajjikkiiktipkaidjutinik, piqpiaqtunik tuhaumapkaidjutinik, push notifications uumunga UK-mi inungnun.

iga.label: Amihunik-Atuqtut IGA Tungavia
iga.outcome: Piliuqtuq qitqani tunngavinga uumunnga cloud-native kinauyaakhaanik piyunnautinga tunngavinga ikayuqtuq Fortune 500 ikayuqtauyut ASP.NET Core Identity for NoSQL havakviup aktikkulaangani.

euAdjacent.title: EU-Atayuq, Nunaryuami Tuniqhainiq
euAdjacent.description: CET havaknikkut ikaangniit atuqhimablutik Norwaymi, Netherlandsmi, Germanymi, ahinilu.

yourEngineers.title: Qauyimayiuyutit, niuviqtitiyiungituq
yourEngineers.description: Akhuuqtut havaqatigiiktut ilaujut havaarijarnut atuqtakhanullu. Piqangittuq maningnik atan'nguyanik, tikisinik utaqqiyuittut.

hardwareToCloud.title: Hardware to Cloud-mut
hardwareToCloud.description: Iliuraqhimayut device firmware talvunga enterprise Azure Synapse pipelines. Tamatkiumayumik qaritauyaliqutit tamaini qaliriini.

partners.subtitle: Qaritauyaliqinikkut Katitiqhimayut
partners.title: Battle-Tested <gradient>Stack</gradient>
partners.description: Atuinangitavut hapkuat hanalrutit — tuyuqtavut piliurninnga timiqutigiyangit. Talvanga Microsoft Azure-mit Kubernetes-mut, qauyimayivut piqaqtut nunaryuami ayuitpiaqtunik.

cloudInfra.label: Cloud-guyuq Aulapkaitjutikhallu
cloudInfra.description: Amihunik-cloud-mik hanayauniganik container-nik ihuaqhautinik hanahimayuniklu naunaipkutinik.

frontend.label: Hivunngani
frontend.description: Nutaat ilagiyangit tunngavingit qanurittaakhaanik aaniqtailiniq ihuarhaqhimayuqlu piliurninnga hanalrutingit.

backend.label: Backend unalu APIs
backend.description: Enterprise-grade server platforms, systems languages, ukuallu nutaat API paradigms.

data.label: Naunaiyautit uvalu Tutquumaviit
data.description: Relational, titiqqat, iluanilu tutquumaviit tamatkiumayumik titiraqhimayunik qiniqhiadjutit.

devops.label: DevOps unalu Hanalrutikhangit
devops.description: CI/CD pipelines, version control, unalu developer productivity.

cloudNative.title: Cloud-Native by Default
cloudNative.description: Tamaita havaaghat puuqhimayut, CI/CDkut-aulayut, uvalu havaktauhimayut hanigaanun aktilaangit hivulirmin.

fullStack.title: Full-Stack Fluency
fullStack.description: React frontends talvunga .NET microservices talvunga Kubernetes clusters — atauhiq havaqatigiiktut, nunguani nunguanut.

productionProven.title: Havaktaunikkut-Itquumayut
productionProven.description: Hapkua tautuktitingitut ayungnaqtutigut. Tamarmik atuqtakhat titiraqhimajut hakugikhipkaijut atuqtauqpiaktunik kivgaqtuijut atuqtunik ublumi.

faq.subtitle: Qauyimayamingnik Tunngavia
faq.title: Apirhuutauraanginnaqtun <gradient></gradient>

scope.question: Hunauva hivunikhaq havaaq?
scope.answer: Tunihivaktugut nungunianun nungunianun qaritauyaliqinikkut havaaghat: ihuaqhaqhimayut havagviup qaritauyaliqutait, AI/ML pipelines, cloud igluqpait, IoT auladjutit, DevOps aatumatitut, uvalu qaritauyakkut aalanguqtirnirit uqaudjiyut. Piumaguvin tamatkiumayumik tungavikhamik havaktauhimayumik uvaluuniin tugaaqhimayumik ilauqatigiingnirmik atuqtauyunun pihimayunun, munariyavut idjuhikhait, pivallianiit, uuktuutit, uvalu atuliqtirnirit.

stack.question: Hunauvat qaritauyakkuurutikhat?
stack.answer: Qitqani katitiqhimayut qitqaniitut havagvingni-aktilaangit tungaviit: Azure unalu AWS cloudmun, .NET unalu Node.js backend, React unalu Angular hivungani, Kubernetes unalu Docker orchestration, unalu Terraform aulapkaidjutinun naunaitkutait. Havakhimaanginaqtugut tapkuninga Python AI/MLnik havaktauyukharnik, Power BI unalu Fabric nanminiqaqtunik ayuittiarutikharnik, unalu PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MongoDBmilu naunairutingnik.

enterprise.question: Qanuqtut munarivakpigit havakviup havauhikhangit?
enterprise.answer: Tamaita ilauqatigiingniq aulagutiyuq qiniqhianikkut atugahanik naunaiyagiangani anginikhaa, idjuhikhaa, uvalu iniqtirutait. Havakpiakpaktut havaqatigiiktut qaritaujaliqinikkut hivulliqtiqaqtut, qakugungurangat tikinnahuaqtamingnik ihivriuqhivaktut, imaalu pivikhanik hanajinut atuqtakharnik. Malikpaktavut agile sprints tigumidjutiqaqtunun tautuktitiyut, pihimablugit tautungnaqtut havaaghat katimayiit, tunihiblutalu havainirni qanuriniitigut uniudjutinik.

support.question: Qanuritpat kinguani-angmaqtirutaani ikayuutikhat?
support.answer: Tunihiyugut ihuaqhaqhimayunik ikayuutighanik naunaiyaqhimayunik SLAnik, ilauyut 24/7 munaridjutit, hulaqutinun kiudjutit, havauhiit ihuaqhiyuumirutit, qanuriniillu ihuaqhaqhimayut. Ikayuutikkut angirutivut pidjutiqaqtut ihuiguhuutinun ihuaqhaidjutit, qayangnautikkut ihuaqhautit, igluqpait aktilaangit, uvalu ihuaqtumik aaniaqtailinikkut ihivriurutit — ihuaqhaqhimayut auladjutainun uvalu kiudjutinun piyakhanun.

integration.question: Ilaliutiniaqigit taja hanahimayunik?
integration.answer: Ilaa. Ayuittiaqtugut utuqqanik nutaanguqtiriniq, API-hivulliqpaami ilaliutiniq, unalu hybrid-cloud nuutirniq. Ilaliutiyumaguvin nayugaani ERP auladjutainun, nuutiqlugit monoliths hamunga microservices, uvaluuniin atadjutigilugit utuqanguqtut tutquumaviit nutaanun hivungani, piqaqtugut nuutingnikkut atugahanik uvalu ilauqatigiingnikkut atuqhimayaptingnik ayungnaitumik.

industries.question: Kituni havagvingni havakpakpit?
industries.answer: Havaktivut tunihivaktut havaakhanik tamainni fintech, aanniaqtailinikkut, logistics, e-commerce, auladjutit, kavamatkullu havagviit. Kangiqhimayugut havagvikyuanun-kitunun piyakhat imaatun PCI-DSS akiligahanun, HIPAA ihumagiyauyut aanniaqtailinirmun naunaiyautit, GDPR maligahat hapkununga EU niuvaavingnun, uvalu atuqtauqpiaqtut alguyaqtuutit havagvikyuanun IoT.

engagement.question: Qanuqtut iniaqqa ilaupkainiq havaanga?
engagement.answer: Aullaqtiqpaktuq ilitturinahuarnirmun kangiqhiyaami hivuniqhaliuqtarnik ayurnaqtuniklu nunainnik. Talvannga, tunivaktugun naunaijarnikkut titiraqmik piqaqtumik nappaqtirutikhakkut pitquidjutinik, ublukhainnun, maniliurnikkullu aviktuqhimajunik. Angiqtaukpat, aullaqtirniaqtavut akhuuqtut havaqatigiiktut, ilaulugit atuqtakhatit havauhikhallu, aullaqtirlugu hivulliqpaaq sprint qakugunnuaq.

faq.ctaDescription: Havaakhamik ihumavit? Uqautigilaqqut anginikhaa, kiklighait, maniktigutlu.
